---
title: "New publication on attention control in the brainz"
date: 2026-05-01
categories: [Paper]
description: "Our latest work on attention control and large-scale brain network dynamics is now available."
image: ../../images/lablogo.png
page: "/publications/2026/pnas-qpp"
link: ""
---

Our latest work on attention control and large-scale brain network dynamics is now available.
